holdings.infoBox: IQSI is an equity ETF with a total of 619 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 5.20%, Novartis AG at 1.98%, Roche Holding AG at 1.97%, AstraZeneca at 1.87%, and Nestlé at 1.77%.

overview.description: The NYLI Candriam International Equity ETF (IQSI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks a proprietary index of developed-market stocks selected by ESG criteria and weighted by market-cap. IQSI was launched on Dec 17, 2019 and is issued by New York Life Investments.
infoTable: IQ Candriam ESG International Equity Index
